name: Saved by the Bell
description: The NBC Saturday-morning teen sitcom about the Bayside High crew, plus its spin-offs and reboot

questions.q: Who plays Zack Morris, the scheming blonde lead of Saved by the Bell?

source.notes: Gosselaar dyed his naturally dark hair blond for the role.

questions.q: Who plays the wrestler-jock A.C. Slater?

source.notes: Last original cast member added; later hosted Extra.

questions.q: Who plays the bumbling geek Samuel 'Screech' Powers?

source.notes: Diamond was 12 when he joined the cast.

questions.q: Who plays Jessie Spano, Zack's feminist best friend?

source.notes: Starred in Showgirls a few years later.

questions.q: Who plays head cheerleader Kelly Kapowski?

source.notes: Credited as 'Tiffani-Amber Thiessen' at the time.

questions.q: What is the name of the diner where the Bayside gang hangs out?

source.notes: Owned by a magician-barkeep named Max.

questions.q: What is the name of Bayside High School's principal?

source.notes: Played by Dennis Haskins across the original run and spin-offs.

questions.q: What is A.C. Slater's full first and middle name?

source.notes: Hence the 'A.C.' nickname.

questions.q: On which network did Saved by the Bell originally air Saturday mornings?

source.notes: Anchored the TNBC lineup.

questions.q: What is the name of the earlier Disney Channel series that was rebranded for NBC as Saved by the Bell?

source.notes: Set at John F. Kennedy Junior High in Indianapolis.

questions.q: In the infamous 'Jessie's Song' episode, what is Jessie Spano addicted to?

source.notes: Pills were changed from speed to caffeine in later script revisions.

questions.q: Which actress plays the fashion-forward Lisa Turtle?

source.notes: Originally written as a Jewish girl from Long Island.

questions.q: What is the name of Zack's in-show rock band?

source.notes: Performed the song 'Friends Forever.'

questions.q: In which 1994 TV movie do Zack and Kelly get married?

source.notes: Served as the series finale for The College Years.

questions.q: In what year did Saved by the Bell originally premiere (as the retitled Bayside-set show)?

source.notes: Ran through 1993 on NBC.

questions.q: What oversized mobile phone does Zack famously carry in the early seasons?

source.notes: First handheld cellular phone, released 1984.

questions.q: Which summer beach club serves as the setting for the 1991 summer episodes?

source.notes: The gang works there between school years.

questions.q: What role does Zack Morris hold when the Peacock reboot picks up with the gang decades later?

source.notes: Whose decision to close down low-income schools kicks off the reboot plot.

questions.q: Which streaming service launched a Saved by the Bell reboot in 2020?

source.notes: In the reboot, Zack Morris has become governor of California.

questions.q: Who created the original Saved by the Bell?

source.notes: Peter Engel served as executive producer.

questions.q: In the spin-off Saved by the Bell: The College Years, the gang attends which fictional university?

source.notes: Ran one season (19 episodes) in 1993-1994.

questions.q: Jessie Spano's actress later starred in which infamous 1995 Paul Verhoeven flop-turned-cult-classic?

source.notes: Showgirls has since become a cult classic.
